build_rule: Hook and default APKs were built in separate clean no-daemon Gradle invocations. The default build used an unset ISY_CARGO_FEATURES environment.
post_device_host_only_changes: 5225aed9d8192ff500e627e46c86add2dfb32eb5 removes target identifiers from Agent confirm audit
09a2d954e082afe7d6bc038d225e0a8969ee4d66 fixes minSdk compatibility and was rechecked on device with the default APK

10a6fe79df12100743a09f9f37f65147b24870aa allows the standalone mobile backup worker to use the installed write token when no read token exists; the exact final APK was reinstalled and a real mail backup succeeded
